overview: Andhra Loyola Institute of Engineering and Technology (ALIET), Vijayawada, officially states that it was established in 2008 and is managed by the Society of Jesus (Jesuits). The institute functions on a green 98-acre campus shared with Andhra Loyola College and positions itself around the motto 'Service and Excellence' with a strong focus on holistic engineering education.
accreditation: AICTE approved; JNTUK affiliated; autonomous; NAAC A+ (3.33); NBA accredited; ISO 9001:2015.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech - Civil, EEE, Mechanical, ECE, CSE, CSE (AI and ML), CSE (Data Science), IT

admissions.admissionProcess: The official admissions page states that 70% of UG and PG seats are filled through centralized APSCHE counseling, while the remaining 30% are institutional B-category seats. Lateral entry seats are filled through AP ECET, and MBA admissions use AP ICET.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET, ECET, and ICET counseling schedules are announced by APSCHE each cycle; ALIET publishes institution-level admission notices on its official website.

campus.specialNote: The official site highlights a serene campus at the foothills of the Eastern Ghats and a Jesuit educational approach focused on competence, compassion, and commitment.

contact.address: ITI Road, ALC Campus, Polytechnic Post Office, Vijayawada - 520008, Andhra Pradesh, India
